productDisplayName: Flying Machine Men Woven Black Belt
description: Style Note flying machine's swashbuckle styling is now available in its belts, pun intended! Riveting, bold designs at an affordable price, this FM belt is a buy you will not regret - as long lasting as it is stylish.  Product Details Black fabric belt with a tang clasp (and a fixed loop)Metal eyelets that act as holes for the belt Material and Care Cotton Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Size and Fit Length at largest setting: 106 cm
